race.comment: Race dominated by first-starters, a number of which have shown enough at the trials to suggest they can make an early impact. KOKONDA (2) has been particularly impressive at his past two, showing good speed to win a Wangaratta jumpout before sitting off them in an Echuca trial and rounding them up under a light ride. Would have liked him to have drawn better but looks a versatile type. JIVE DANCER (1) is another who comes here off two jumpout wins, settling prominent in both. There looked to be a little extra under the hood in each, too. TEMU TILLY (10) has been to the races once and went around $16 and only whacked away after enjoying a good run but it was a performance that suggested she'll be much better suited up to this trip. LUFITAAH (7) was outclassed at G3 level at her final run last prep but has jumped out well and this is a suitable fresh assignment.
